# Carpenterwala

> India's trusted digital marketplace to book verified, background-checked handymen in Bangalore and all over India.

## Core Services
- [Carpentry Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/carpentry): Custom woodwork, modular kitchen setup, furniture repairs, and office fit-outs in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Painting Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/painting): Interior/exterior painting, color consultancy, and wall repair guide in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Plumbing Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/plumbing): Leak repairs, piping, and bathroom installations in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Electrical Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/electrical): Residential wiring, light installations, and switch repairs in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Appliance Repair Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/appliance-repair): Appliance repair services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Cleaning Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/cleaning): Cleaning services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Pest Control Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/pest-control): Pest control services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [AC Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/ac-services): AC services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Water Tank Cleaning Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/water-tank-cleaning): Water tank cleaning services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Water Purifier Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/water-purifier): Water purifier services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Home Automation Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/home-automation): Home automation services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Intercom Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/intercom): Intercom services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [CCTV Installation Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/cctv-installation): CCTV installation services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Computer Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/computer-services): Computer services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Home Loan Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/home-loan): Home loan services in Bangalore and all over India.
- [Home Insurance Services](https://carpenterwala.com/services/home-insurance): Home insurance services in Bangalore and all over India.

## Verification & Trust
- Background Checks: 100% of professionals undergo identity background checks and skill verification.
- Warranty Manager: Customers can manage home repair warranties via their dashboard.

## Useful Links
- [FAQ](https://carpenterwala.com/faq): Answers to booking, verification, and warranty questions.
- [Find a Professional](https://carpenterwala.com/find-a-professional): Browse profiles, read reviews, and request quotes.
- [Sitemap](https://carpenterwala.com/sitemap): Visual directory of service regions and profiles.
